---
title: "helper -- individual state " 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r}
this_state <- state_list[i]
```


```{r}

convert_html_link_to_md <- function(text){
  
  if (str_detect(text, "a href")){
      html_link <- str_sub(text, str_locate(text, "a href=")[1,1]-1, str_locate(text, "</a>")[1, 2])
    url <- str_sub(html_link, str_locate(html_link, "href=")[1,2]+2, str_locate(html_link, "'>")[1, 1]-1)
    txt <- str_sub(html_link, str_locate(html_link, "'>")[1,2]+1, str_locate(html_link, "</a>")[1, 1]-1)
    md_link <- paste0("[", txt, "](", url, ")")
    str_replace(text, html_link, md_link)
  } else {
    text 
  }
  
}

pull_specific_text <- function(type, cat, var_to_pull){
  text <- demo_text |> 
    filter(
      state_name == this_state, 
      type == !!type, 
      group_cat == !!cat
    ) |> 
    pull(all_of(var_to_pull)) 
  
 ifelse(
   text != "<div class = 'notetxt' style = 'text-align: left;'><p></p></div>", 
   text,
   "_[state did not have any notes, will show as blank on dashboard]_"
   ) |>  
    # replace character for times 
    str_replace_all(pattern = "&#215", replacement = "&times;") |> 
    # replace bold 
    str_replace_all(pattern = "<b>|</b>", replacement = "**") |> 
    # replace italic 
    str_replace_all(pattern = "<i>|</i>", replacement = "_") |>
    # replace bullet points 
    str_replace_all(pattern  = "<li>", replacement = "- ") |> 
    str_replace_all(pattern = "</li>", replacement = " \n") |> 
    # make title 
    str_replace_all(pattern = "<div class='table-title'>", replacement = "#### ") |> 
    # clean up;
    str_remove_all(pattern = "</div>") |> 
    str_replace_all(pattern = "<div class = 'notetxt' style = 'text-align: left'>", replacement = "  \n") |> 
    # update link from html format to md 
    convert_html_link_to_md() |> 
    # pull out 
    glue()
}

```

# `r this_state`

**Race and Ethnicity**  

```{r}
#| results: asis
pull_specific_text("Population", "race_ethnicity", "state_notes")
```

  
**Sex or gender**  

```{r}
#| results: asis
pull_specific_text("Population", "sex_gender", "state_notes")
```
